headline: Turn source images into searchable text
subtext: Vision Assistant helps recipients extract text from screenshots, photographed documents, and notes in the browser during case review.
image_alt_text: Desktop social graphic featuring Hush Line's dark-mode Vision Assistant page. The card shows the Tools section with the Vision Assistant tab selected, a note that the OCR runs in the browser, and an Add Images file picker for extracting searchable text from photos and screenshots.

social.bluesky:
Sometimes a source sends photos or screenshots instead of a clean writeup.

Hush Line's Vision Assistant helps recipients turn those images into searchable text in the browser, without sending image data to Hush Line servers.

Sign up at https://hushline.app.
social.linkedin:
Sometimes a source sends photos, screenshots, or scanned pages instead of a clean writeup.

Hush Line's Vision Assistant helps recipients turn those images into searchable text in the browser, without sending the image data to Hush Line servers.

Sign up at https://hushline.app.

rationale: This screenshot is a new topic family within the last month and maps directly to the documented recipient workflow in USE-CASES: turning screenshots or photos into searchable text during case review. The copy stays recipient-facing, avoids admin framing, and grounds the value in the browser-based OCR flow shown on the page.
copy_brief: Write for recipients and staff using Hush Line day to day, not for platform admins.
title: Tools - Vision Assistant (artvandelay)
